title: rubus involutus
intro: Rubus involutus, also known as the involute dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus involutus include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Rubus involutus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its leaves and fruits can also be used in culinary dishes and herbal remedies.
